intro: Hoplophytum lingulatum, also known as Hoplophytum, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Hoplophytum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal effects.
